title: Malacocarpus macrogonus
taxonomy: Malacocarpus macrogonus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the genus Malacocarpus and family Fabaceae. It is a succulent plant native to South Africa. Malacocarpus macrogonus is further classified as a member of the subfamily Faboideae and the tribe Phaseoleae. The exact classification may vary depending on the source and current taxonomy. Malacocarpus macrogonus is a rare and lesser-known species within its genus.
